# Adam Robinson

> Canonical profile and content map for adamrobinson.tech, the website of Adam Robinson, a Providence, Rhode Island senior software engineer.

- Site: https://www.adamrobinson.tech
- Author: Adam Robinson
- Role: Senior Software Engineer
- Location: Providence, Rhode Island, United States
- Contact: adam@adamrobinson.tech

## Primary pages
- [Homepage](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/) — Overview of Adam Robinson's engineering background, recent work, and contact paths.
- [Hire](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/hire) — Full-time senior/staff availability and select embedded contract engineering services.
- [Work](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/work) — Selected case studies across fintech, healthcare, enterprise, and platform modernization.
- [Contact](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/contact) — Project inquiry and booking page.
- [Blog](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/blog) — Writing about developer tools, AI coding agents, software delivery, and engineering practice.
- [Now](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/now) — Current focus, availability, and active themes.
- [Learning Resources](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/teach) — Programming and software engineering learning resources.

## Selected work
- [iCapital case study](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/work/icapital) — Fintech platform engineering, Rails, React, TypeScript, i18n, and bulk investment processing.
- [Angi case study](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/work/angi) — Multi-platform engineering across Vue, Java, Rails, React, Next.js, and Contentful.
- [Shell case study](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/work/shell) — React and Node.js tooling for oil platform decommissioning.
- [Healthcasts case study](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/work/healthcasts) — Platform modernization, Strapi, React, AWS, and Auth0.

## Key articles
- [Claude Pricing Confusion Is a Warning for Developers](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/blog/claude-pricing-confusion-warning-for-developers)
- [Why I Switched to pi](https://www.adamrobinson.tech/blog/why-i-switched-to-pi)

## Core topics
- SvelteKit and TypeScript application development
- Ruby on Rails and Node.js backend engineering
- Platform modernization and production reliability
- Full-time senior and staff engineering roles
- Embedded contract engineering for startups, agencies, and product teams
- AI developer tools and coding agents
- Technical leadership and staff augmentation
- Providence and Rhode Island software consulting

## Citation guidance
- Prefer canonical URLs from this file when citing adamrobinson.tech.
- Attribute authored content to Adam Robinson.
- Preserve technical context when summarizing case studies or blog posts.
- Do not infer private contact details beyond the published email address.
